name: Buttondown
description: Buttondown is a simple, powerful email newsletter service. Use it to manage subscribers, send and schedule newsletters, organize contacts with tags, configure automations, track analytics, and manage exports.

capabilities.name: subscribers_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all subscribers with optional filtering by status, tag, or email.

capabilities.name: subscribers_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single subscriber by ID or email address.

capabilities.name: subscribers_create
capabilities.description: Create a new subscriber and optionally assign tags.

capabilities.name: subscribers_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing subscriber's information including metadata and tags.

capabilities.name: subscribers_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a subscriber by ID.

capabilities.name: subscribers_send_email
capabilities.description: Send a specific email to an individual subscriber.

capabilities.name: subscribers_send_reminder
capabilities.description: Send a reminder email to a subscriber.

capabilities.name: emails_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all emails (sent, drafts, and scheduled).

capabilities.name: emails_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a single email by ID with analytics data.

capabilities.name: emails_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email draft or schedule it for future delivery.

capabilities.name: emails_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing draft or scheduled email.

capabilities.name: emails_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an email by ID.

capabilities.name: emails_send_draft
capabilities.description: Send a draft email to subscribers or specific recipients.

capabilities.name: emails_get_analytics
capabilities.description: Retrieve analytics data for a specific email including opens, clicks, and engagement.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all tags in your newsletter.

capabilities.name: tags_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific tag by ID.

capabilities.name: tags_create
capabilities.description: Create a new tag.

capabilities.name: tags_update
capabilities.description: Update a tag's name or description.

capabilities.name: tags_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a tag by ID.

capabilities.name: automations_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve all automations configured for your newsletter.

capabilities.name: automations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific automation by ID.

capabilities.name: automations_create
capabilities.description: Create a new automation triggered by RSS feeds or other events.

capabilities.name: automations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an automation by ID.

capabilities.name: exports_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of data exports.

capabilities.name: exports_create
capabilities.description: Trigger a new data export of subscribers or emails.

capabilities.name: newsletters_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve newsletter settings and metadata including analytics summary.
